title: Mom (Yahir's mother)
html:
Yahir's mother — Iracema Vargas in formal contexts (iracema vargas is the legal-name page; this is the relational page). The single most-recurring family figure in the corpus alongside dad yahir. Source of the "TQM" sticky-note ritual ("te quiero mucho"), the infertility-and-$40K-fertility-spend backstory that anchors "mi engaño", and the buy mom a house aspiration that drives much of the debt of gratitude arc.

TL;DR

  • 27 inbound links — second-densest family entity after dad.
  • Source of the "TQM" sticky-note ritual — small physical love-tokens that recur across years of Yahir's notes.
  • Yahir's primary protector-of-household frame (protector of household) — see 2019 11 24 mom said i said theres a costco in roseburg and 2025 09 20 on Austin.
  • The buy mom a house goal is the load-bearing motivational target across the 2022–2026 founding arc — the explicit conversion of debt of gratitude into a purchase.
  • Backstory: infertility + ~$40K fertility spend is the origin of "mi engaño" — the loving deception that birthed Yahir.

Key facts

  • TQM sticky notes. Recurring through 2021 09 03 pavitos / 2025 07 26 thoughts and things 7 25 2025 — the persistence-of-affection signal.
  • Bilingual / Spanish-first. 2025 01 01 Vargas Family Lineage, 2025 12 05 ida translations — Yahir keeps her in Spanish where it matters.
  • The fertility-spend backstory. Documented in 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022, 2025 07 26 thoughts and things 7 25 2025, 2021 12 22 love as sacrifice aphorism — the origin of "mi engaño" as both endearment and weight.
  • Costco / Roseburg vignettes. 2019 11 24 mom said i said theres a costco in roseburg — the small-town life-fabric layer.
  • Buy-mom-a-house arc. 2022 09 23 buy mom a house is the canonical statement; recurs through Austin planning (the Austin move is partly justified by income-trajectory needed for this).
  • Documents-handling helper. 2019 10 19 see if mom can scan the documents — admin scaffolding for college apps.
  • Stays in touch with friends. 2025 07 16 keepintouchwithfriends — Yahir uses her as the model.
  • Birthday/poem ritual. 2023 05 05 happy birthday poem.

Chronological arc

  • 2018–2020 — supporting/scaffolding role through college apps (2019 10 19 see if mom can scan the documents, 2020 12 17 book essay, 2020 03 07 papi).
  • 2021–2022 — explicit gratitude + life-debt acknowledgment (2021 09 03 pavitos, 2021 08 24 jann people list, 2021 12 22 love as sacrifice aphorism, 2022 02 05 Al Forthan Email, buy mom a house).
  • 2023 — birthday poem (2023 05 05 happy birthday poem); ongoing todos (2023 09 05 todo 82423).
  • 2024–2025 — fertility / lineage layer surfaces (2025 01 01 Vargas Family Lineage, 2025 07 26 thoughts and things 7 25 2025); Austin move framed partly through her (2025 09 20 on Austin).
  • 2025–2026 — protective frame intensifies as Yahir's own income trajectory becomes load-bearing for the family.

Source summaries

  • 2020 01 02 voice memo 0015 — earliest first-person mention of marriage-strain ("under the carpet")
  • 2020 02 08 voice memo 1422 — Dad-leaves-to-Mazatlán prelude
  • 2021 10 12 voice memo 1000 — mom defending dad during a violence flare-up
  • 2022 09 23 buy mom a house — load-bearing aspiration
  • 2025 07 26 thoughts and things 7 25 2025 — fertility/lineage layer
  • 2025 01 01 Vargas Family Lineage
  • 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022
  • 2021 12 22 love as sacrifice aphorism
  • 2025 09 20 on Austin — Austin justification
  • 2023 05 05 happy birthday poem
  • 2025 07 16 keepintouchwithfriends
  • 2021 09 03 pavitos
  • 2019 11 24 mom said i said theres a costco in roseburg

Plus ~17 additional family / planning summaries.

Connections

  • dad yahir — paired family entity
  • iracema vargas — legal-name entity
  • yahir family — family unit
  • mi engano · protector of household · alcoholism in the family — family-frame concepts
  • debt of gratitude — the love-as-debt frame
  • buy mom a house — the materialization aspiration
  • family as hidden runway (synthesis) — how she scaffolded everything
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 (synthesis) — the anchor through isolation
